title: SAFE FAMILIES FOR CHILDREN - 211info
text: HEARTS WITH A MISSION GRANTS PASS SAFE FAMILIES FOR CHILDREN Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Network of local agencies and churches committed to preventing child abuse and helping at-risk families manage crisis situations by providing out-of-home respite care. Volunteer families build relationships with at-risk families and can open their homes to at-risk children. The program works towards child welfare deflection by providing a safe alternative to child welfare custody. Also works towards child abuse prevention by providing an at-risk parent with a safe, temporary place for their child without threat of losing custody and averting potential abuse/neglect episodes. 1504 NE 9th Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Ages 0-22. Families eligible if they do not currently have an open case with ODHS Child Welfare. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email (541) 956-4190 .. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 956-4190 Mariah Brennan [email protected] Main phone (541) 951-4289 Heather Siewell [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information or application FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Photo ID AREA SERVED: Jackson and Josephine Counties SITE HOURS: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Services: Children's Out of Home Respite Care Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - TRANSITIONAL LIVING PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
